English Practice Area - Long LLM Digest

Read AGENTS.md first. It is canonical.

Product model
- The product is not a loose collection of English tools.
- It is a connected learning loop: onboarding -> assessment -> recommendation -> practice -> feedback -> review -> profile/map/progress.
- The core unit is a topic-centric structure. Builders are lenses over the same underlying learning system.

Core runtime
- `src/lib/catalog.ts` defines builders, topics, and related metadata.
- `src/lib/data/practice-bank.ts` defines authored practice blueprints and safe fallback blueprints.
- `src/lib/server/learning.ts` creates sessions, updates review timing, computes recommendations, and builds many workspace snapshots.
- `src/lib/server/topic-views.ts` builds builder hub, builder catalog, topic detail, and learning map snapshots.
- `src/lib/engine/evaluator.ts` evaluates practice responses and emits user-facing feedback with confidence metadata.
- `src/lib/engine/scoring.ts` computes response, session, weekly, and speed-bonus scores.
- `src/lib/db/schema.ts` is the persistence source of truth.

Critical invariants
- Builders are not separate backends.
- Manual practice and recommendation-driven practice both update the same mastery and review state.
- Ungrounded topics must not generate broad open-ended prompts.
- `hybrid_choice_text` items use recognition-first flow; the follow-up may be `exact_rewrite` or `open_production`.
- `exact_rewrite` accepts normalized exact matches before any generic text evaluation.
- `feedbackConfidence=low_confidence` means the UI should not present a normal authoritative numeric score.

Auth and deploy
- Auth.js Google sign-in is configured in `src/auth.ts`.
- Production requires `AUTH_SECRET`, `NEXTAUTH_URL`, `DATABASE_URL`, `AUTH_GOOGLE_ID`, `AUTH_GOOGLE_SECRET`.
- Production Postgres must be remote. Localhost database URLs are invalid on Vercel.
- Google OAuth issues commonly break at either invalid client, invalid secret, or callback URL mismatch.

Surface map
- `/` marketing/auth entry
- `/home` recommendation-first dashboard
- `/builders` builders hub
- `/builders/[builder]` topic catalog
- `/builders/[builder]/[topicKey]` topic detail, history, and launch actions
- `/practice/[sessionId]` focus-mode practice
- `/review` due review queue
- `/profile` overview, map, and progress insights
- `/progress` and `/map` redirect into profile tabs

If you need details:
- Domain terms: `docs/domain-glossary.md`
- Practice contracts: `docs/practice-contracts.md`
- Data model: `docs/data-model.md`
- Troubleshooting: `docs/troubleshooting.md`
